title: Poster: Return What You Borrow
subtitleProgress: Question {{current}} of {{total}}: Choose posters that promote honest borrowing!

stages.question: Which poster best reminds friends about borrowing responsibility?

choices.text: Take what you want, when you want! 🎯
Borrow today, return tomorrow - keep trust strong! 🤝

stages.question: What poster best encourages on-time returns?

choices.text: Return when you feel like it! 🚫
A promise to return is a promise to keep! ✨
Borrowed items are better than new ones! 🆕

stages.question: Which poster teaches the best borrowing habit?

choices.text: Ask, use, return - the right way to borrow! ✅

stages.question: What poster helps maintain trust between friends?

choices.text: Your trust is priceless - I'll return it! 💎

stages.question: Which poster best explains why returning matters?

choices.text: Every return builds trust - let's build together! 🌈
Why buy when you can borrow forever? ♾️
